Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: QuestNav
Description: QuestNav lists all your active quests and adds a Teleport button next to each one. Clicking it teleports you to the nearest unlocked aetheryte to the quest's location â€” no more hunting through the map.
Punchline: One-click teleport to the nearest aetheryte for each active quest.
Changelog:
v1.1.3: Arrow background opacity slider (0 = transparent, 1 = opaque).
v1.1.2: Fix arrow overlay never appearing (IsOpen was never set to true).
v1.1.1: Fix crash on quests with IDs not present in the Excel sheet.
v1.1.0: Arrow overlay, teleport cost, zone highlight, map flag, compact mode, auto-refresh, type badges.
v1.0.0: Initial release.
